pageContext.name: Wolverine Returns #2 (Variant Edition)
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Grey Matter Art are proud to present the Wolverine Returns #2 (Variant Edition) Fine Art Print!  Created in an otherwordly style by the legendary Moebius (Jean Giraud) as variant cover art for Return of Wolverine #2, this thoughtfully subdued Wolverine artwork is limited to 125 pieces and is printed by Grey Matter Printing.  It's an art and comic lover's delight! Indulge in the fantasy-esque world of Moebius and celebrate an iconic Marvel superhero by adding this Wolverine print to your collection today!
